creator: ebd@oau.org
text:
Quoting Mark Linimon:
>Synopsis: RocketPort problems
>
>Responsible-Changed-From-To: mjacob->freebsd-bugs
>Responsible-Changed-By: linimon
>Responsible-Changed-When: Thu Aug 26 02:37:31 GMT 2004
>Responsible-Changed-Why: 
>Is this still a problem with modern versions of FreeBSD?

This problem still exists although it appears to be just cosmetic.

rp0: <rp> port 0x30c0-0x30ff irq 5 at device 6.0 on pci3
rp0: driver is using old-style compatibility shims
WARNING: driver rp should register devices with make_dev() (dev_t = "#rp/0x10000")

FreeBSD alfred.oau.org 4.11-RELEASE-p9 FreeBSD 4.11-RELEASE-p9 #43: Sat May 14 06:12:08 EDT 2005     root@alfred.oau.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/AMD-MP  i386

I will attach the kernel configuration file.

Thanx,

EBD
-- 
Elliot Dierksen          "They that can give up essential liberty to
                          obtain a little temporary safety deserve
                          neither liberty nor safety" -- Benjamin Franklin
